overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from a fantasy RPG showing students in robes gathered in a grassy castle courtyard. The scene features ornate Gothic towers in the background and a Quidditch goal post, with characters conversing and practicing with brooms under bright afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with Quidditch practice area

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing students practicing and conversing in the castle grounds

notable_agents.action: student holding a broomstick and gesturing while conversing with peers near the Quidditch hoop
group of three students standing together and observing the practice session

entered.detail: tall golden-yellow tower with pointed roof and multiple windows
prominent red and pink stone tower with crenellations
greenish stone tower with intricate carvings and archway
tall wooden goal post with circular hoop used for Quidditch practice
string of triangular pennant flags suspended between towers
cluster of pointed Gothic spires visible in the background

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot captures a sunny afternoon in a fantasy castle courtyard. Students in dark robes gather on the grass near a Quidditch goal post, with some observing from the left while others practice with brooms on the right. Gothic towers and decorative banners frame the background beneath a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, sun-drenched afternoon within a fantasy castle courtyard where students gather for practice. It begins with a wide view of the grassy grounds, framing students in dark robes as they congregate near a Quidditch goal post. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts between those observing from the left and others actively practicing with brooms on the right. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding architecture, with ornate Gothic towers and decorative banners rising against a bright blue sky filled with scattered clouds.
